DNS configuration

resolver #1
  search domain[0] : corp.example
  nameserver[0] : 10.0.0.53
  nameserver[1] : 2001:4860:4860::8888
  if_index : 14 (en0)
  flags    : Request A records, Request AAAA records
  reach    : 0x00000002 (Reachable)

resolver #2
  domain   : vpn.example
  nameserver[0] : 10.8.0.53
  nameserver[1] : fe80::1%utun3
  if_index : 21 (utun3)
  flags    : Supplemental, Scoped
  reach    : 0x00000003 (Reachable,Transient Connection)

resolver #3
  domain   : corp.example
  nameserver[0] : 10.0.0.53
  if_index : 14 (en0)
  flags    : Scoped
